title: Software Update - DFU - Turn off the device before starting DFU
scenario: DFU fails gracefully with "Update currently not available" popup when device is powered off before starting firmware update
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has an available firmware update.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
5. Turn off the device (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the device powers down).
expected: After step 5: Nothing happens; the app remains on the "Software Update" screen. After step 8: An "Update currently not available, please try back later" popup appears. After step 10: The popup closes and the user is returned to the "Three Easy Steps" screen.
